text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Current time—five p.m. Quota has been successfully met. Now
engaging in a brief moment of respite before initiating the next phase
of training.

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: U-um, excuse me, are you Mihono Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An Umamusume jogs over to where Bourbon is resting.

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I hope I'm not interrupting anything! I just think it's really
awesome how hard you're working every day!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No need to be concerned. It appears that you wish to have a
discussion. How can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Uh, well... I heard you used to only run sprints, right? It's so cool that
you're able to run medium-distance now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mihono Bourbon stares curiously at the excited student.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: If I may ask, what is the purpose of this conversation?

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You engaged me in conversation during my break. Statistically, this
action suggests an underlying motive.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Common motivations include queries, transmission of information, and
fact-checking. Which of the above best suits your purpose?

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text: P-purpose?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the Umamusume struggles to find an answer, her face begins to
turn pink.

text_block_list.name: Honest Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to talk to you... I'm sorry for taking up your time! I'll get
going now!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Wait, there's been a misunderstanding...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perplexed, Mihono Bourbon watches the embarrassed trainee speed
away.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My conversation ended unexpectedly due to insufficiently defined
"motive" parameter. Analyzing crash log for source of error.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have been updating my database with facial expressions and vocal
inflection samples, but I am experiencing difficulty implementing
them in conversations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling bemused, I take a moment to think. Is this her unique way of
trying to get better at talking to people?
choice_data_list: Can I ask you why you're doing this?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Certainly. I was prompted by my parents to improve my "sociability"
functions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The majority of my formative years were spent training from sunrise to
sunset with my father. Consequently, I seldom had opportunities to
interact with my peers.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Once my acceptance to Tracen Academy was confirmed, my parents
began to demonstrate great concern over my limited interpersonal
experiences.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
On multiple occasions, they told me to, and I quote, "prioritize
engaging with my friends and classmates."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is true that communicative abilities are essential for interviews and
fan engagement. As an Umamusume, enhancing my "sociability" is
simply unavoidable.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I defined a set of parameters related to "sociability," and have
endeavored to refine them by engaging in conversation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, the statistics have shown limited improvement relative to
that of my physical parameters.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A study showed that questions are effective starters, but they only
caused my conversational partner to flee. At this rate, failure is
certain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell her intentions are good, but her methods leave much to be
desired.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Are her parents this robotic too? I get the feeling Bourbon is
interpreting their instructions in an over-rational way.
choice_data_list: I think what your parents wanted to say was...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that her parents probably just want her to enjoy spending
time with friends. In response, her expression becomes more puzzled.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, but I am having trouble comprehending. I have no data
pertaining to "spending time with friends."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reframing my explanation, I begin talking about the benefits of
having friends, but am cut short.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My resting period concluded twenty seconds ago. I must now return to
my training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Without a second to spare, she takes off down the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's racing abilities are no doubt impressive, but her
lack of connection with the world beyond the race track concerns me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch her figure dart across the field, I pray that one day she'll
understand the meaning behind her parents' words.
